q1_sink_dangerous.evidence: Sink is string concatenation and return of an HTML string on line 163, no network I/O, shell execution, or irreversible side effects.

q2_observable_after_return.evidence: The violation is unescaped user-tainted parsed_xml embedded in the returned HTML string, directly observable in the return value.

q3_result_in_memory.evidence: returns.kind is 'value' and returns.exprs contains the full HTML string with parsed_xml concatenated, accessible in memory.
